news.t: Direxion Announces Reverse Split of JDST, SOXS, DUST, HIBS, MUD & TSLS

overview.description: The Direxion Daily S&P 500 High Beta Bear 3X ETF (HIBS) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P 500 High Beta index. The fund provides 3x daily inverse exposure to a beta-weighted index of 100 highest-beta stocks in the S&P 500. HIBS was launched on Nov 7, 2019 and is issued by Direxion.

data.title: Direxion Announces Reverse Split of JDST, SOXS, DUST, HIBS, MUD & TSLS
data.text: New York, United States, Feb. 05, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Direxion , a leading provider of ETFs for tactical traders, has announced it will execute a reverse split of the issued and outstanding share...
